raw.objective: “The objective of this analysis was to quantify the effects of a single dose of topiramate (100 or 200 mg) on working memory, attention, and psychomotor speed as measured by the SDMT”
raw.covariates: Tested: age, study, sex and NPT (number of prior test administered) Included: age and NPT
raw.observations: Topiramate EC50 was associated with a 25.5% reduction of SDMT score relative to baseline. Findings need to be evaluated in a broader patient population undergoing chronic treatment, as the narrow range of resultant concentrations limits their generalizability.
raw.dose: Single oral and IV doses in healthy subjects
raw.structure: Direct-response inhibitory Emax model (SDMT data treated as a continuous variable)
raw.equations: Eij = E0i * THNPT>1*(1+THage*(AGEi – AGEmed))*(1-(Emax,I*Cpij)/(EC50i+Cpij)) E0 = theta1*exp(eta1) Emax = theta2 EC50 = theta3 THNPT>1 = theta4 THage = theta5 Cobs = Cipred*(1+eps1)
raw.parameter_values: theta1=59.3 theta2=0.51 theta3=2.85 theta4=1.07 theta5=-0.0113 omega1=0.033 sigma1=0.026

structural_model.description: Direct-response inhibitory Emax model (SDMT data treated as a continuous variable)

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: Eij = E0i * THNPT>1*(1+THage*(AGEi – AGEmed))*(1-(Emax,I*Cpij)/(EC50i+Cpij)) E0 = theta1*exp(eta1) Emax = theta2 EC50 = theta3 THNPT>1 = theta4 THage = theta5 Cobs = Cipred*(1+eps1)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Single oral and IV doses in healthy subjects
study.objective: “The objective of this analysis was to quantify the effects of a single dose of topiramate (100 or 200 mg) on working memory, attention, and psychomotor speed as measured by the SDMT”

tested: sex and NPT (number of prior test administered)
covariates.raw: Tested: age, study, sex and NPT (number of prior test administered) Included: age and NPT

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
